content:
**📣 Volunteer Localization Project — March Update**

Hello everyone, and welcome to what's going to be an exciting new chapter for the project! We have a lot to share, so let's get into it! @everyone 

**🎉 Welcome, New Volunteers!**

We're thrilled to announce that a new wave of volunteers is joining us this month across all languages! Please give them a warm welcome as they get settled in. We're really glad to have everyone here. If you're new, don't hesitate to introduce yourself and reach out to your language team's mod if you have any questions about getting started.

**📄 Source Sheet & Terms List Update**

We've updated the source sheet! It contains all the latest in-game content, in all 11 current in-game languages. Please make sure you're working from the latest version! 
Head to <#1402537664619479103> for the latest files. New volunteers will need to first be added to our secure google group to access the files, and it may take some time. If you are still unable to access the file, please double check if you provided the correct google email in your application form.

In addition to the source sheet, we've also **expanded the terms list** with a significant number of new entries, so there's plenty for everyone to dig into. A few things to note:

EN terms have already been translated, but **many terms in other languages are still machine translated** and need attention. This is a great place to start if you're looking for something to work on.
If you update or correct a term, please** highlight it in yellow** so it's easy for the team to track what's been reviewed.

Every update, no matter how small, makes a real difference to the consistency of the game across all languages — so thank you in advance!
The latest source sheet contains everything except certain upcoming content that isn't ready to be shared yet — we'll update it as soon as we're able to.

**📢 Update on EN Skill Translation**

After further discussion with the team, we're** lifting the hard lock on English skill description volunteer translations and edits**— thank you for your patience on this, and sorry it took us a while to get here!

That said, there are a couple of things worth knowing so you're not caught off guard:

Skill descriptions are **frequently updated on our end right up until the moment we ship**, so if your submission overlaps with an in-progress or pending change, it **may not make it into that update cycle**.
All skill translation PRs will still go through an internal double-check before being added into the game.
If you notice your skill translation didn't make it into the latest update, this is usually why. It's not a reflection of the quality of your work; sometimes our combat designers simply changed the CN text so it failed to upload.
If you believe something was missed in error, please reach out to me directly and I'll do my best to look into it, though I may not always be able to respond immediately. 
We'll also keep this situation noted in future announcements so everyone stays in the loop.

The latest source sheet contains everything except certain upcoming content that isn't ready to be shared yet — we'll update it as soon as we're able to.

**🛡️ Language Mods**

**We're looking for Mods for Languages other than EN and RU!**As the project grows, we're putting a proper structure in place for each language team. 
Going forward, each language will have at least one dedicated mod to help guide the team, answer questions, and maintain quality. Please let us know if you're interested in becoming a Mod!

**📄Aptitude Tests (EN & RU)**
For our English and Russian teams specifically, incoming volunteers will be asked to complete a short aptitude test coordinated by the respective mods. 
This helps our largest and most active teams manage workflow and keep submissions consistent; regardless of the result, there will be a place for you in the project, so please don't be stressed about it!

If you're an existing volunteer, you **do not need to retake the test**. This applies to new joiners only.

For any questions about the test, please reach out directly to your language mod:

🇬🇧 EN: <@88644018673582080> <@183782216353054720> 
🇷🇺 RU: <@209037554333253632> 
Thank you all for being part of this! Whether you've been here since the beginning or are just joining us now, every contribution matters. Let's make this next chapter a great one! 🙏
For any questions regarding the project, you can reach out to me <@1376763322568937562> or our other staff <@1384428399061106739>.
